creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi portmgr@,

I would like to schedule an exp-run with the new Heimdal 7.7.0. Unfortunately the patch is 32 MB. So, here's the URL: https://cschubert.com/distfiles/0001-heimdal-Vendor-import-7.7.0.patch.xz. The .xz is only 5.3 MB.

The patch will not incrementally build. It must be built using a clean tree. (This was the build issue I had discovered before.)

The only other gotcha is that ObsoleteFiles.inc can frequently change, resulting in a git-apply or git-am failure. (There may be more work to do on ObsoleteFiles.inc too.)
